channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: josephmisiti/awesome-machine-learning
item.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: RSSNext/Folo
item.description: 🧡 Follow everything in one place

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: SWE-agent/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using your LM of choice. It can also be employed for offensive cybersecurity or competitive coding challenges. [NeurIPS 2024]

item.title: microsoft/edit
item.description: We all edit.

item.title: dockur/macos
item.description: macOS inside a Docker container.

item.title: cline/cline
item.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL v0, Cursor, Manus, Same.dev, Lovable, Devin, Replit Agent, Windsurf Agent, VSCode Agent, Dia Browser, Trae AI & Cluely (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Tools & AI Models.

item.title: DrewThomasson/ebook2audiobook
item.description: Generate audiobooks from e-books, voice cloning & 1107+ languages!

item.title: excalidraw/excalidraw
item.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: alacritty/alacritty
item.description: A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine based on deep document understanding.

item.title: microsoft/terminal
item.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases
item.description: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

item.title: waydroid/waydroid
item.description: Waydroid uses a container-based approach to boot a full Android system on a regular GNU/Linux system like Ubuntu.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: atuinsh/atuin
item.description: ✨ Magical shell history

item.title: denoland/deno
item.description: A modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.

item.title: munificent/craftinginterpreters
item.description: Repository for the book “Crafting Interpreters”

item.title: selfhst/apps
item.description: Self-hosted software and application directory for easy browsing and discovery

item.title: run-llama/llama_index
item.description: LlamaIndex is the leading framework for building LLM-powered agents over your data.

item.title: lvgl/lvgl
item.description: Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

item.title: nektos/act
item.description: Run your GitHub Actions locally 🚀

item.title: tasks/tasks
item.description: Bringing Astrid Tasks back from the dead

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: yt-dlp/yt-dlp
item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.title: GyulyVGC/sniffnet
item.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

item.title: swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings
item.description: A list of useful payloads and bypass for Web Application Security and Pentest/CTF

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: toeverything/AFFiNE
item.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

item.title: DMJC/anime_queue
item.description: Screening Application for Anime and Filler content

item.title: LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
item.description: Truly independent web browser

item.title: Cinnamon/kotaemon
item.description: An open-source RAG-based tool for chatting with your documents.

item.title: sdmg15/Best-websites-a-programmer-should-visit
item.description: 🔗 Some useful websites for programmers.

item.title: zellij-org/zellij
item.description: A terminal workspace with batteries included

item.title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
item.description: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: mfts/papermark
item.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets management, PKI, and SSH access.

item.title: GitbookIO/gitbook
item.description: The open source frontend for GitBook doc sites

item.title: ahmetoner/whisper-asr-webservice
item.description: OpenAI Whisper ASR Webservice API

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: twpayne/chezmoi
item.description: Manage your dotfiles across multiple diverse machines, securely.

item.title: hexgrad/kokoro
item.description: https://hf.co/hexgrad/Kokoro-82M

item.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
item.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
item.description: 12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

item.title: phaserjs/phaser
item.description: Phaser is a fun, free and fast 2D game framework for making HTML5 games for desktop and mobile web browsers, supporting Canvas and WebGL rendering.

item.title: abhisheknaiidu/awesome-github-profile-readme
item.description: 😎 A curated list of awesome GitHub Profile which updates in real time

item.title: caelestia-dots/shell
item.description: A very segsy desktop shell

item.title: binwiederhier/ntfy
item.description: Send push notifications to your phone or desktop using PUT/POST

item.title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: venera-app/venera
item.description: A comic app

item.title: qarmin/czkawka
item.description: Multi functional app to find duplicates, empty folders, similar images etc.

item.title: gtsteffaniak/filebrowser
item.description: 📂 Web File Browser

item.title: Rust-GPU/rust-gpu
item.description: 🐉 Making Rust a first-class language and ecosystem for GPU shaders 🚧

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️ Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, organize, and preserve webpages, articles, and documents.

item.title: comfyanonymous/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: maybe-finance/maybe
item.description: The personal finance app for everyone

item.title: thewh1teagle/kokoro-onnx
item.description: TTS with kokoro and onnx runtime

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: http://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.title: zed-industries/zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern design AI chat framework. Supports multiple AI providers (OpenAI / Claude 4 / Gemini / DeepSeek / Ollama / Qwen), Knowledge Base (file upload / knowledge management / RAG ), Multi-Modal (Plugins / Artifacts / MCP) and thinking. One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT/ Claude / DeepSeek application.

item.title: vercel/ai-chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: win32ss/supermium
item.description: Chromium fork for Windows XP/2003 and up

item.title: tldr-pages/tldr
item.description: 📚 Collaborative cheatsheets for console commands

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: openai/whisper
item.description: Robust Speech Recognition via Large-Scale Weak Supervision

item.title: brunodev85/winlator
item.description: Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

item.title: NVIDIA/NeMo
item.description: A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is an open-source declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, JavaScript, or Python apps.

item.title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
item.description: Stable Diffusion web UI

item.title: CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB
item.description: Open source RGB lighting control that doesn’t depend on manufacturer software. Supports Windows, Linux, MacOS. Mirror of https://gitlab.com/CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB. Releases can be found on GitLab.

item.title: spotify/basic-pitch
item.description: A lightweight yet powerful audio-to-MIDI converter with pitch bend detection

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 3, Mistral Small 3.1 and other large language models.

item.title: UberGuidoZ/Flipper
item.description: Playground (and dump) of stuff I make or modify for the Flipper Zero

item.title: ventoy/Ventoy
item.description: A new bootable USB solution.

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems

item.title: dotnet/Silk.NET
item.description: The high-speed OpenGL, OpenCL, OpenAL, OpenXR, GLFW, SDL, Vulkan, Assimp, WebGPU, and DirectX bindings library your mother warned you about.

item.title: vladmandic/sdnext
item.description: SD.Next: All-in-one WebUI for AI generative image and video creation

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin-media-player
item.description: Jellyfin Desktop Client

item.title: lowlighter/metrics
item.description: 📊 An infographics generator with 30+ plugins and 300+ options to display stats about your GitHub account and render them as SVG, Markdown, PDF or JSON!

item.title: unclecode/crawl4ai
item.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don’t be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

item.title: syncthing/syncthing
item.description: Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

item.title: esimov/pigo
item.description: Fast face detection, pupil/eyes localization and facial landmark points detection library in pure Go.

item.title: mealie-recipes/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: iptv-org/iptv
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: langchain-ai/langchain
item.description: 🦜🔗 Build context-aware reasoning applications

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, KMS38, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.
